title: Fix admin dashboard route registration and accessibility

requirements.text: Verify and fix the /admin route registration in App.tsx TanStack Router configuration to ensure the route is properly defined with correct path '/admin' and component reference to AdminDashboardPage

quotes: hello start a fix admin deshbord

acceptanceCriteria: The /admin route is registered in the TanStack Router routes array in App.tsx
The route component correctly references AdminDashboardPage from frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.tsx
The route definition follows the same pattern as other routes in the application (dashboard, profile, etc.)

requirements.text: Ensure the AdminDashboardPage component import statement in App.tsx uses the correct file path and module name from frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: AdminDashboardPage is imported at the top of App.tsx
Import uses correct casing and file extension (.tsx)
No import errors or module resolution issues

requirements.text: Test that navigating to /admin URL renders the AdminDashboardPage component for authenticated admin users without showing 404 not found error
acceptanceCriteria: Visiting /admin in the browser loads the AdminDashboardPage
No 404 or route not found errors appear
Admin users with isAdmin=true can access the page
Non-admin users see appropriate authorization message

requirements.text: Verify the Admin navigation link in Layout.tsx correctly routes to /admin when clicked and is visible only to users with admin privileges
acceptanceCriteria: Admin link appears in Layout navigation menu for admin users
Clicking the Admin link navigates to /admin route
Link is hidden for non-admin users
Link uses proper TanStack Router Link component for navigation

constraints: Do not modify the backend admin authorization logic
Do not change the AdminDashboardPage component implementation
Maintain consistency with existing TanStack Router patterns in App.tsx
nonGoals: Adding new admin features beyond routing fixes
Modifying admin authorization checks in AdminDashboardPage
Changing the admin dashboard UI or functionality
Adding new backend methods or API endpoints
